calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Joseph Wood, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Mary Lynn Slattery, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Brunton Vineyards, Inc., Bruntno Vineyards Holdings, Inc. or D. Geno Brunton.
Defaults were entered against defendants on July 29, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, September 2, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Mary Lynn Slattery, and against the Defaulted Defendants Brunton Vineyards, Inc., Brunton Vineyards Holdings, Inc. and D. Geno Brunton as follows:

Damages/Principal - $80,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $21,553.33.
Costs - $355.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $101,908.33.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2010 Continued To Sep-13-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-26-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2010 Continued To Jun-18-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. The OSC is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Proceedings not reported. (212)
